candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; matches total sales/revenue and is in the candidate list.
Not revenue; this is COGS.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Non-operating income, not top-line revenue.
Interest income, not revenue from operations.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct production/service cost line; more specific than the total cost of revenues subtotal.
Also represents COGS, but is a broader total/subtotal and less preferred than the specific line.

variables.notes: Preferred the specific direct-cost line over the total/subtotal.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A component; overhead/admin expense.
Possible overhead bucket, though may include non-SG&A items such as FX-related losses.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized development expenses for software development - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not an income statement SG&A expense.
Headcount disclosure, not an expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly amortization; should be excluded from XSGA per rules.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: D&A component; should be excluded from XSGA per rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization, not SG&A overhead to include.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized development expenses for software development - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: R:nc. Used a row outside the candidate list because the candidate list clearly misses the key SG&A row 'Sales expenses', which is a primary overhead component. Excluded amortization/depreciation rows per instructions. Did not include 'Other operating expenses' because it appears driven by FX/non-business items and is less clearly SG&A. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales expenses

candidates.row_label: Capitalized development expenses for software development - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet capitalization, not a dedicated R&D expense line on the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized development expenses for software development - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet amortization/impairment, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized development expenses for software development - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line appears on the income statement. Balance sheet capitalized development rows are not suitable for XRD under the stated rules.

candidates.why: Captures recurring financing costs in one line; appropriate when granular components are incomplete/duplicated.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Relevant interest component, but the same label appears twice and would not fully capture all finance expense by itself.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Relevant recurring interest component, but only one part of total finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of the lease-interest line; not preferred when primary statement line exists.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not the period expense line to map for XINT.

variables.notes: Selected the total finance expense line because granular interest rows are duplicated/incomplete, and using the total best captures recurring financing costs without double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation/comprehensive income line, not balance sheet book equity.
Best available equity line on the balance sheet; preferable to Total Equity when no separate NCI line exists.
Also valid, but less preferred than the more specific shareholders' equity line.
Liability, not equity.
Balancing line, not equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet equity labels as a priority list. No separate non-controlling interest line is present, so BE uses the reported total/shareholders' equity line.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet.
